data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Already fixed by commit 76d491bd (2026-03-27). _state_write uses tempfile.mkstemp + os.replace (POSIX-atomic rename). SIGURG handler also writes atomically via independent tempfile+rename. All runners route through _state_write; no non-atomic write path exists. test_state_write_is_atomic in tests/scripts/test-batched-state-integrity.sh verifies both the pattern and functional guarantee. Reported 226→19 regression is not reproducible under current code via the hypothesized truncation mechanism — likely a pre-fix artifact or stale state file from earlier session.
